title: SMS Text - Reply to Confirm Appointment?
excerpt: I’m looking for an app or integration I can use to send an SMS text message asking clients to reply with a “Y” or “N” that can update something on the board (a status or text field). Does anyone have any suggestions?

posts.author: blsmith5 (brian.smith@amsti.org)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m looking for an app or integration I can use to send an SMS text message asking clients to reply with a “Y” or “N” that can update something on the board (a status or text field). Does anyone have any suggestions?

posts.author: MichelleMikula (Michelle)
posts.cookedHtml: i too am looking for something like this but so far none of them directly link back to updated a monday column depending on the customers response. Have you found anything?

posts.author: jennifer986block (Jennifer Block)
posts.cookedHtml:
brian.smith@amsti.org:

I’m looking for an app or integration I can use to send an SMS text message asking clients to reply with a “Y” or “N” that can update something on the board (a status or text field). Does anyone have any suggestions?

Hello @blsmith5,
You might want to consider using Twilio for sending SMS messages and collecting responses. It supports tracking replies and triggering updates based on those responses. You can set it up to sync with your board and update statuses or text fields based on the client’s “Y” or “N” replies.

Another option is Zapier, which can integrate SMS apps with various project management tools. Through Zapier, you can connect tools like Twilio or SimpleTexting to automatically update your board based on the SMS replies received. Lone Star College

Let me know if this helps or if you need more specific recommendations!

Best regards,
Jennifer Block
